description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single test stage containing two jobs. The codequality job runs on the alpine:latest image, downloads and extracts shellcheck in its before_script (wget -nv https://storage.googleapis.com/shellcheck/shellcheck-stable.linux.x86_64.tar.xz, tar xvJf shellcheck-stable.linux.x86_64.tar.xz, cp shellcheck-stable/shellcheck /usr/local/bin) and then executes shellcheck easygg and shellcheck test/test.sh. The tests job runs on the centos:latest image, installs bash, ImageMagick, epel-release, and jhead via yum in its before_script (yum install -y bash ImageMagick, yum install -y epel-release, yum install -y jhead) and runs cd test && ./test.sh in its script, both jobs belong to the test stage with no additional artifacts, caches, or rules.
